title: awards — published events
description: Award issuance triggered by performance benchmarks, competition wins, goal achievements, or manual admin issuance. Certificates rendered async via jobs.

events.name: AwardTemplateCreated
events.trigger: New AwardTemplate row. Defines criteria + design.

events.name: AwardIssued
events.trigger: Award issued to athlete. Certificate render queued.

events.name: AwardRevoked
events.trigger: P1 event. Award revoked (rare — usually after result amendment). Full audit chain.

events.name: CertificateRendered
events.trigger: Async job completed. PDF certificate stored + linked.
